hooks.name: Log Spec Task Completion
hooks.description: After a spec task is completed, record the progress in the project documentation.

action.prompt: A spec task was just completed. Run `Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'` for the real date and time (24-hour), then: update .kiro/PROJECT_STATE.md to reflect the task moving to Done and set the next action, and append a brief timestamped entry to .kiro/BRAIN.md (stamped with the full 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm' timestamp) noting which task/spec was completed and its outcome. Keep entries terse and factual; never fabricate.
